headline: More Data Means More Creditworthy Mortgages with VantageScore 4.0 versus FICO 10T
summary: SAN FRANCISCO, July 07, 2026--A new analysis confirms VantageScore 4.0 leverages traditional and alternative data more effectively to create a precise view of consumer mortgage risk and credit scores for millions more consumers when compared to FICO 10T. The study, titled More Data Means More Creditworthy Mortgages: How VantageScore 4.0 Enables Lenders to Serve Millions More Creditworthy Borrowers than FICO 10T, examines how VantageScore’s advanced credit modeling techniques and broader data set

headline: FICO Consumer Study: Most Americans Who Don’t Own a Home Say Homeownership Feels Out of Reach
summary: BOZEMAN, Mont., July 07, 2026--FICO’s Homeownership Survey shows most Americans who don’t own a home say homeownership feels out of reach

headline: What to Expect From Fair Isaac’s Q3 2026 Earnings Report
summary: Fair Isaac is set to report third-quarter results soon, with analysts expecting robust double-digit EPS growth.
